ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING
FACEBOOK ADS
Use at least 3 of these elements across your ads.

CHECKLIST 5 - ELEMENTS OF HIGH-CONVERTING FACEBOOK ADS
At least 1 clearly-defined
benefit, 3 benefits ideal
Bullets calling out benefits
(optional but effective)
Clear CTA inside the
body copy section
Avatar callout near the top
Real customer
testimonials (optional)
Include hyperlinks within
body where relevant
(max 2 for short ads,
3 for long form)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
